retry_reason: Not a wrapper; the put is not the primary function and its occurrence depends on linkwatch_clean_dev return value — retry semantics are irrelevant.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is linkwatch synchronization (cleaning and doing device work), not reference-count management. The __dev_put call is an incidental cleanup step within broader event handling logic.
